channel.title: Configs on alexherbo2
channel.description: Recent content in Configs on alexherbo2

item.title: Control mpv from the command-line
item.description: Configuration Enable the IPC support to control mpv from the command-line. ~/.config/mpv/mpv.conf input-ipc-server=~~/socket Commands Play / Pause echo cycle pause | socat - "$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/mpv/socket" You can add a key-binding to XF86AudioPlay and XF86AudioPause media controls. Next Track echo playlist-next | socat - "$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/mpv/socket" You can add a key-binding to XF86AudioNext media control. Previous Track echo playlist-prev | socat - "$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/mpv/socket" You can add a key-binding to XF86AudioPrev media control.
